stemHtml: GPS satellites broadcast signals that enable a suitable receiver to obtain a position. Each satellite transmits:

options.a: Ranging signals on the L1 and L2 UHF frequencies.
options.b: Distance information for civilian users on the L1 UHF frequency only.
options.c: Receiver position data on the L1 UHF frequency only.
options.d: Receiver position data on the L1 and L2 UHF frequencies.
